name: moltbotteam--jupiter-prediction-market
description: Complete Node.js client for Jupiter Prediction Market API. Use when building AI agents for prediction market trading, portfolio management, or automated trading bots on Solana. Covers: (1) Querying events, markets, orders, positions, payouts, history, and social features, (2) Creating/managing trading positions, (3) Claiming payouts after market settlement, (4) Building autonomous agent workflows for market scanning, opportunity finding, portfolio monitoring, and risk management.
